body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to circle back on the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) opportunity now that their Series A terms are a bit clearer. I know you'd flagged some hesitation around the grid-edge hardware component, but I think the updated deck addresses a lot of that, and their software margins are honestly stronger than anything I've seen at this stage in the climate infra space. We're putting together a small syndicate and [Halfway Capital](funds/halfway-capital) felt like a natural fit given your focus area. Would love to get you on a call with the founders this week if you have any bandwidth — they're sharp and I think you'd click with them. Let me know what your schedule looks like.
